briefdescription.para: Get a node identifier for a mapped partition with a given label property.
Test if a mapped partition with a given label property exists.

simplesect.para: 1 if the device has a "zephyr,mapped-partition" compatible, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Test if zephyr,mapped-partition compatible node exists.

simplesect.para: 1 if node exists and has a zephyr,mapped-partition compatible, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get a numeric identifier for a mapped partition.

parameterdescription.para: node identifier for a zephyr,mapped-partition node.

simplesect.para: the partition's ID, a unique zero-based index number.

briefdescription.para: Get the node identifier of the NVM memory for a partition.

parameterdescription.para: node identifier for a zephyr,mapped-partition node.

simplesect.para: the node identifier of the internal memory that contains the zephyr,mapped-partition node, or DT_INVALID_NODE if it doesn't exist.

briefdescription.para: Get the node identifier of the NVM controller for a partition.

parameterdescription.para: node identifier for a zephyr,mapped-partition node.

simplesect.para: the node identifier of the memory technology device that contains the zephyr,mapped-partition node.

briefdescription.para: Get the absolute address of a mapped partition.

detaileddescription.para: Example usage: DT_MAPPED_PARTITION_ADDR(DT_NODELABEL(storage_partition)) // 0x103a000 This macro can only be used with partitions of internal memory addressable by the CPU. Otherwise, it may produce a compile-time error, such as: __REG_IDX_0_VAL_ADDRESS' undeclared`.

parameterdescription.para: node identifier for a zephyr,mapped-partition node

briefdescription.para: Get the offset address of a mapped partition from the NVM node.

detaileddescription.para: Example usage: DT_MAPPED_PARTITION_OFFSET(DT_NODELABEL(storage_partition)) // 0x3a000 This macro can only be used with partitions of internal memory addressable by the CPU. Otherwise, it may produce a compile-time error, such as: __REG_IDX_0_VAL_ADDRESS' undeclared`.

parameterdescription.para: node identifier for a zephyr,mapped-partition node

simplesect.para: the partition's offset from the memory device.
